summary: A USCIS Alien Registration Requirement PSA: generic stock B-roll (typing hands, DHS flag, fingerprint, child raising hand in class) under large captions, with a voiceover reading the legal requirement to register under Trump's EO 14159. It is a captioned informational/compliance directive driven by narration, not a music-driven youth-appeal or genre piece.
notable_text: all aliens to register; is making sure aliens comply; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
